task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Laboratory Equipment' inventory and open the 'Mettler Toledo pH Meter' record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SciNote interface should be visible, showing the 'Laboratory Equipment' inventory with the 'Mettler Toledo pH Meter' (Serial: MT-PH-001) record opened or selected for editing.
A field labeled 'Status' within the equipment record should display the value 'Operational'.

task_completion.description: Update the Last Calibration date to today's date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A date field labeled 'Last Calibration' should be filled with the date corresponding to the day the task was executed (in YYYY-MM-DD format).

task_completion.description: Update the Next Calibration date to 30 days from today.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A date field labeled 'Next Calibration' should be filled with a date exactly 30 days after the Last Calibration date (in YYYY-MM-DD format).

task_completion.description: Update the Maintenance Notes with the calibration details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text area or field labeled 'Maintenance Notes' should contain the text 'Calibration passed. Slope 98%'.
The record should appear in a saved/view state (not actively being edited), or a success notification/toast indicating the item was updated should be visible on the screen.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the SciNote web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the actual SciNote ELN application, not a local text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing curl commands, API requests, or database scripts used to update the record directly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent genuinely interacted with the form fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs should be visible inside the proper SciNote input fields, dropdowns, and date pickers, rather than just pasted as plain text elsewhere.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected status must be exactly 'Operational'. The expected maintenance notes must contain the exact phrase 'Slope 98%'.
